Document:
# Network Implementation (Character Stats)
This page covers how character stats are synchronized between server and client.
## AutoNetworkedField
Stat fields that clients need to display use the [mono]AutoNetworkedField[/mono] attribute:
[DataField, AutoNetworkedField] public int EffectiveStrength { get; set; }
[DataField, AutoNetworkedField] public Dictionary StrengthModifiers { get; set; } = new();
When the server updates these fields, all connected clients automatically receive the new values.
## What Gets Synced
- Effective stat values (for display in the character window) - Modifier dictionaries (so client can show the breakdown) - Available points (for the stat spending UI)
## What Stays Server-Only
- Base stat validation logic - Overflow calculation - Database persistence
## Client UI Update
When the client receives an updated stat component, the character window refreshes automatically. The UI reads from the networked fields to show: - Current effective value - Modifier breakdown by source - Available points remaining
## Content Under Construction
Full network implementation documentation coming soon. See [textlink="Network Synchronization" link="OE14_DEV_Arch_Netcode"] for the general networking architecture.
